heading: Use of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
label: 20111 Use of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
text: On dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation, any assets of the corporation remaining after the discharge of all liabilities shall be distributed as provided by the board of governors, but in compliance with the charter and bylaws.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2011136:985., , .Aug. 31, 1960Pub. L. 86–680, § 1574 Stat. 577The word “satisfaction” is omitted as included in “discharge”, and the word “obligations” is omitted as included in “liabilities”. The words “outstanding” and “all Federal and State laws applicable thereto” are omitted as unnecessary.
